guardrails.rule: Regular cookie packs, family-size cookies, and single-serve snack multipacks are distinct products and must NOT be merged, cross-priced, or share a baseline/canonical tracker unless explicitly intended.
examples: Chips Ahoy 9.5–13 oz regular pack != Nabisco Single Serve Snacks 10 pack
Chips Ahoy regular cookies != Chips Ahoy mini multipack
guardrails.enforcement: Each script-ready item carries a pack_type (regular_retail_pack / multipack / single_serve_pack / broad_promo_block). Items of different pack_type are never blended and single-serve/multipack items never feed a regular-pack tracker.
